title: Cadences
empty: No schedules yet. Create one via Run Wizard ("Recurring" mode).
enableConfirm: Enable "{{name}}"? It will start spawning runs on schedule.
disableConfirm: Disable "{{name}}"? It will STOP spawning runs — no new runs are created until the schedule is enabled again.
deleteConfirm: Delete schedule "{{name}}"? Created runs (Voyage) will remain in history.
notificationsHint: Notifications about run results for this schedule are configured in the Notifications tab (persistent rule for this schedule).
